title: Spatial Gene Set Enrichment Analysis with Applications to Spatially Resolved Transcriptomic Data.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Spatially resolved transcriptomics enables the systematic characterization of spatial gene expression variation across tissue sections. Spatially variable genes within the same biological pathway often exhibit similar spatial expression patterns, reflecting shared biological functions and tissue organization.
